name: Mexican Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together except cheese.
2. Pour half of the mixture into a hot, greased cast iron skillet or square glass baking dish.
3. Sprinkle half of the cheese over the cornmeal mixture.
4. Pour the remaining cornmeal mixture into the skillet or baking dish and top with the remaining cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
6. Allow to cool and set about 15 minutes before serving.
